betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6FTB Ultimine§f

§aVein mining has never been easier!§f
Tired of mining coal or chopping trees block-by-block? §9FTB Ultimine§f allows you to harvest large, connected clusters of blocks simultaneously.

§6Ultimine Mechanics§f:
§b• Multi-Block Harvesting§f: Mine up to §c64 blocks at once§f. By holding your active Ultimine key (default is the grave key §9`§f), breaking a single block will harvest all connected blocks of the same type.
§b• Empty Hands Allowed§f: You are §anot restricted to tools§f — you can trigger Ultimine with your bare hands, though using a tool is much faster.
§b• Ore & Stone Merging§f: Stone types are merged together, meaning you can clear huge pathways of mixed smooth stone and cobblestone in a single sweep.
§b• Heavy Exhaustion§f: Mining with Ultimine drains §c4.0 exhaustion points per block broken§f. You will consume food extremely fast if you over-use it.

§6Mining Modes§f:
§b• Shape Cycling§f: §9Shift-scroll§f while holding the Ultimine key to cycle through different shape modes (standard vein mining, tunnels, or flat layers).

§eTip§f: Always keep high-saturation §9Pam's HarvestCraft§f meals in your inventory before embarking on a major mining spree.

§cNote§f: Plant twerking near crops and saplings to accelerate their growth is §cdisabled§f in this pack.
